title: seddera glomerata subsp. dhofarensis
intro: Seddera glomerata subsp. dhofarensis, also known as Dhofar seddera, is a sub-species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dhofar seddera include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its therapeutic properties.
